caption: The video captures a formal meeting or assembly, likely a legislative session, where several individuals are seated in rows of green chairs equipped with microphones. The participants, dressed in traditional attire and wearing face masks, appear to be engaged in a serious discussion. The setting suggests a government or parliamentary environment, as indicated by the structured seating arrangement and the presence of official documents and signs such as "DO NOT SIT." The text overlay on the screen mentions a "JUSUN STRIKE" and urges the federal government (FG) to ensure a speedy resolution, hinting at a pressing issue being addressed. The video is broadcasted by Plus TV, as seen from the logo and website information displayed.
